---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  contents: "." 
  exclude:
    filename: "index.qmd"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [image, title, description, categories, date]
  image-height: "200px"
  image-placeholder: "../assets/project-placeholder.png"
  feed: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
